rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (MAPS) and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (ALMA-R, TowerInstruct).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (compute confound).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
